title: Knowledge Graph Visualization - interactive concept network
description: React-based interactive knowledge graph showing connections between concepts across all processed videos. API endpoint: GET /api/knowledge-graph queries Qdrant for user concepts, computes pairwise similarity, returns nodes+edges JSON. Filter by tag, date, video. Click node to see definition + source video. The 'aha moment': see cross-video connections you never noticed.
